metro_lines.name: Red Line (Corridor I)
metro_lines.data_source: L&T Hyderabad Metro Rail (HMRL) ridership data 2023-24; longest corridor

metro_lines.name: Blue Line (Corridor III)
metro_lines.data_source: HMRL ridership data 2023-24; serves IT corridor of Hitech City/Gachibowli

metro_lines.name: Green Line (Corridor II)
metro_lines.corridor: JBS (Jubilee Bus Station) - MGBS (Mahatma Gandhi Bus Station)
metro_lines.data_source: HMRL ridership data 2023-24; shortest operational corridor connecting two major bus terminals

lines.name: MMTS (Multi-Modal Transport System)
lines.data_source: South Central Railway MMTS ridership data 2023-24; ridership significantly lower than potential due to service reliability issues

suburban_rail.data_source: MMTS is the only suburban rail service; ridership remains well below capacity

bus_network.data_source: TSRTC annual report 2023-24; operates both city and intercity services in Hyderabad region

transport_network.total_daily_pt_ridership_data_source: Sum of metro (0.48M) + MMTS (0.055M) + bus (3.2M); Hyderabad has lowest PT mode share among 6 cities due to high two-wheeler ownership

economic_baseline.data_source: Median income estimated from NSSO PLFS 2022-23 Hyderabad urban MPCE scaled to household level; Gini from consumption expenditure distribution; formal employment from EPFO data; sectors from Telangana Socio Economic Outlook 2023 (Hyderabad is India's pharma capital with Genome Valley)

validation_anchors_note: To be populated post-Hyderabad calibration; potential anchors include HMRL ridership growth trajectory and TSRTC fare restructuring impact
